name: Porter Cline
awards: Industrial Excellence Award, Heavy Equipment Mastery Recognition
bio: Porter brings high-adaptability field leadership to demanding jobsite conditions, guiding crews through changing scopes while protecting schedule and quality. He is known for decisive problem-solving and clear communication that keeps teams focused and clients informed.
careerHighlights: Manages high-variation jobsites with calm, decisive field leadership.
Keeps crews focused on scope priorities during shifting conditions.
Drives schedule reliability through practical problem-solving in real time.
Maintains strong client coordination across demanding project phases.
funFact: Porter enjoys high-tempo jobs where clear leadership keeps teams on mission.
certifications: Forklift, CPR & First Aid, Procore Certified
